/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/zeropoint_qt.dir/zeropoint_qt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zeropoint_qt.dir/qt/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zeropoint_qt.dir/qt/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zeropoint_qt.dir/qt/configdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zeropoint_qt.dir/qt/emulatorwidget.cpp.o -o bin/zeropoint_qt.app/Contents/MacOS/zeropoint_qt -F/usr/local/lib   -L/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libzeropoint_core.a /usr/local/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib/libSDL2.dylib /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib /usr/local/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /usr/local/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
